title: Carnelian 16x Revamp
description: PVP first texturepack revamped! Autumn themed, with beautiful wooden textures and autumn colors!
body: Carnelian 16x REVAMP is a revamp of,,, you guessed it Carnelian 16x, one of my favourite packs I've made to date! This revamp brings back some much needed life to this dated in quality pack, with the same beautiful colors and styles, but touched up to be as good as it can!
